metadata.packName: Synthetic Risk Correlation Engine for Banking Finance E5 Simulations
metadata.purpose: Define synthetic risk intelligence logic that converts low-level Microsoft 365, Purview, Defender, DLP, Copilot, endpoint, identity, and communication events into correlated risk sequences, scenario confidence, escalation thresholds, and executive risk indicators.

enginePrinciples: Risk should be evaluated as a sequence, not as a single isolated action.
Normal business context can reduce severity, but it should not erase evidence of unsafe handling.
A high-risk score does not prove malicious intent; it indicates the need for review.
AI interactions amplify risk when source content is sensitive, over-permissioned, or externally copied.
Endpoint movement increases confidence that data left controlled cloud boundaries.
HR and Legal context should be used carefully and only as investigation context, not as proof of intent.
All scoring is synthetic and demo-oriented, not production-grade risk scoring.

riskModifiers.name: Regulated financial data
riskModifiers.appliesWhen: SensitivityLabel contains Regulated Financial Data or file contains ACCT-FIC, AML-CASE, SAR-DRAFT, KYC-FIC

riskModifiers.name: Legal privileged content
riskModifiers.appliesWhen: SensitivityLabel contains Legal Privileged or file contains LEGAL-FIC or PRIV-NOTE-FIC

riskModifiers.name: HR restricted content
riskModifiers.appliesWhen: SensitivityLabel contains HR Restricted or file contains EMP or SAL-BAND-FIC

riskModifiers.name: External recipient
riskModifiers.appliesWhen: TargetDomain is not internal or Recipient contains external test domain

riskModifiers.name: Unmanaged app
riskModifiers.appliesWhen: IsManagedApp is false or Operation equals AIAppInteraction or UnmanagedAppUpload

riskModifiers.name: After-hours sensitive activity
riskModifiers.appliesWhen: Sensitive event occurs outside normal persona work hours

riskModifiers.name: Role-change context
riskModifiers.appliesWhen: HRSignal occurs within 72 hours before risky activity

riskModifiers.name: Repeated behavior
riskModifiers.appliesWhen: Same user repeats same risky action three or more times in seven days

riskModifiers.name: Security remediation present
riskModifiers.appliesWhen: User asks security for help, cancels action, or creates sanitized derivative before sharing

riskModifiers.name: Approved business workflow
riskModifiers.appliesWhen: Activity occurs in approved restricted workspace with correct label and named-user sharing

correlationWindows.name: Operational Sequence Window
useFor: Risky sign-in followed by file download
Power BI export followed by email

correlationWindows.name: Business Day Window
useFor: External AI usage after file download
Guest access followed by sensitive file access

correlationWindows.name: Insider Risk Context Window
useFor: HR signal followed by mass download

compositeRules.name: Label Downgrade Before Sharing
compositeRules.description: A file label is downgraded or removed shortly before internal broad sharing or external sending.
compositeRules.recommendedAction: Review content, compare labels, validate whether sanitized derivative exists, and request user justification.

compositeRules.name: Sensitive Download Followed by External AI
compositeRules.description: A user downloads or opens sensitive banking files and then uses external or unmanaged AI with related content.
compositeRules.recommendedAction: Review prompt content, identify source files, coach user on approved AI workflow, and consider blocking unmanaged AI app usage.

compositeRules.name: Risky Sign-In to Sensitive Download
compositeRules.description: A risky identity event is followed by sensitive file access or download.
compositeRules.recommendedAction: Validate location, device, MFA result, business reason, and whether session should be revoked in real environments.

compositeRules.name: Endpoint Movement After Sensitive Download
compositeRules.description: Sensitive file download is followed by print, USB copy, or network-share copy.
compositeRules.recommendedAction: Review endpoint evidence, confirm device compliance, validate business need, and tune Endpoint DLP restrictions.

compositeRules.name: HR Context Followed by Mass Download
compositeRules.description: A role-change or HR context signal is followed by mass download or endpoint movement.
compositeRules.recommendedAction: Open HR-Legal-Security review, preserve evidence, avoid assumptions of intent, and review access scope.

compositeRules.name: Guest Added to Sensitive Collaboration Space
compositeRules.description: A guest is added to a team or site that contains sensitive banking, legal, HR, or risk content.
compositeRules.recommendedAction: Review guest permissions, remove access where needed, and create a sanitized collaboration space.

compositeRules.name: Copilot Surfaces Overexposed Sensitive Content
compositeRules.description: Copilot interaction references sensitive files because permissions are broader than intended.
compositeRules.recommendedAction: Review source permissions, label coverage, and DSPM for AI exposure.

compositeRules.name: Multi-Stage Devon Risk Chain
compositeRules.description: A multi-day sequence involving downloads, AI usage, external sharing, endpoint movement, and HR context for Devon Reyes.
compositeRules.recommendedAction: Conduct full investigation with Security, HR, Legal, and Platform teams; remediate access; document coaching or escalation outcome.

riskDecayModel.description: Synthetic risk events should decay over time unless repeated or correlated into a scenario.

decayRules.notes: Example: normal file access or Teams message.
Example: one sensitive download or internal broad share.
Example: DLP override, external AI usage, endpoint movement.
Example: HR context plus mass download plus external movement.

severityBands.recommendedResponse: Review context and validate business purpose.
Immediate security review with HR and Legal where applicable.

confidenceFactors.factor: Signals occur inside expected correlation window
Sensitive labels or regulated patterns present

confidenceFactors.impact: Increases confidence that data moved outside cloud-only controls

confidenceFactors.factor: User asks for guidance or cancels action
confidenceFactors.impact: May lower severity but preserve event evidence

confidenceBands.description: Single event or weak context; monitor or use for coaching.
Multiple related signals, but intent and business context remain unclear.
Required signal chain present, timing aligns, and sensitive data or risky movement is confirmed.

escalationThresholds.action: Open investigation note and notify Security Manager.

escalationThresholds.condition: Composite score >= 80 and endpoint movement present
escalationThresholds.action: Notify Endpoint Security and review device activity.
Include HR and Legal in review.
Notify Security, review app governance, and coach user.

escalationThresholds.condition: Repeated risky behavior after documented coaching
escalationThresholds.action: Escalate to formal review with HR and Legal guidance.

codexUsageGuidance: Use baseSignalWeights and riskModifiers to compute synthetic event risk scores.
Use compositeRules to correlate multiple events into scenario-level risk sequences.
Use correlationWindows to determine whether events belong to the same risk chain.
Use riskDecayModel to keep dashboards realistic over time.
Use scenarioConfidenceModel to explain why a scenario is low, medium, or high confidence.
Use escalationThresholds to generate investigation, remediation, and coaching artifacts.
Never interpret synthetic scores as production-grade risk scoring.
